recent_excerpts: Rapid7 IR confirms active exploitation of CVE-2025-59718 — a 9.8-CVSS FortiGate SSO bypass — enabling attackers to gain persistent admin access on unpatched appliances.
A proof-of-concept exploit for CVE-2026-39808, a critical command injection vulnerability in Fortinet FortiSandbox, has been released.
CISA added six vulnerabilities in Fortinet, Microsoft, and Adobe software to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, warning of active in-the-wild attacks requiring urgent patching.
